items.title: Colts chart course of 2026 offseason training program
items.summary: As the NFL’s nine-week offseason program is set to begin in April, the Indianapolis Colts have a structured path moving forward into the 2026 season. Indianapolis will open Phase One of the league’s voluntary offseason training program on April 21, which is a period focused strictly on meetings, strength training and rehabilitation. On-field instruction ramps up […]

Originally a 2017 5th round pick of the Colts out of Northwestern, Walker Jr. would appear in 57 career games, making 48 over starts over his first […]

items.title: Indianapolis Colts Best Remaining Free Agent Options: Edge Rusher

items.title: Former Colts WR T.Y. Hilton announces retirement from NFL
items.summary: Hilton, who spent a decade in Indianapolis, ranks third in Colts history in receptions (631) and receiving yards (9,691).

items.title: Colts sign free agent WR Nick Westbrook-Ikhine
